title: Help Stuart | Stuart Anderson MP
meta_description: There are many ways you can be involved in my work to be a strong local voice for South Shropshire. Please fill in the options below and one of the team will be in touch. I look forward to partnering with you.
headings: h3: Stuart Anderson MP South Shropshire
text_excerpt: Help Stuart | Stuart Anderson MP Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Me South Shropshire Parliament News Contact Help Stuart Tweet There are many ways you can be involved in my work to be a strong local voice for South Shropshire. Please fill in the options below and one of the team will be in touch. I look forward to partnering with you. Help Stuart Current Get involved Your details Leave this field blank In which of these ways can you help us? Delivering a few leaflets locally now and again Helping with office and admin tasks Making calls to voters and volunteers Joining our canvassing team to knock on doors Potentially standing to be a local Conservative Councillor Becoming a Digital Ambassador By agreeing to volunteer for us, you also agree to us contacting you about volunteering. For more information, please see our Data Protection and Privacy Policy Would you like us to help you with an application for a postal vote? Yes No Some people find a postal vote useful, especially if they are away during an election. If you answer 'Yes' the official Government website will open in a new tab.
